tests.name: Bulk Zeeman
tests.output:
======================================================================
BULK ZEEMAN (g-FACTOR) VALIDATION
======================================================================
Tolerance: < 5.0% deviation from Roth formula

| Material | g*_Roth | g*_computed | Dev% | Status |
|----------|---------|-------------|------|--------|
| GaAs | -0.3173 | -0.3150 | 0.73% | PASS |
| InAs | -14.6112 | -14.6089 | 0.02% | PASS |
| InSb | -49.2349 | -49.2325 | 0.00% | PASS |

Note: kdotpy's hbulk does not include Zeeman splitting in the
      8-band Hamiltonian. Cross-code comparison requires kdotpy's
      LL symbolic mode, which uses a different API.

Summary: 3/3 materials passed
